personal_info.name: 고채영 (CHAE YOUNG GO)
personal_info.title: Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering
personal_info.summary: Computational modeling of energy materials and structure-property relationships (DFT, MD) 전문 지식을 보유한 연구자입니다. 화학 공학 기반의 원자 수준 시각화 및 시뮬레이션 역량을 갖추고 있으며, 데이터 기반 접근법을 통한 예측 재료 탐색에 주력하고 있습니다.
research_interests: Computational modeling of energy materials and structure–property relationships (DFT, MD)
Orbital-level electronic structure analysis for mechanistic understanding of material properties
Electronic structure and thermodynamic insights for functional material design
Multiscale analysis of materials behavior based on atomistic simulations
Integration of computational chemistry with data-driven approaches for predictive materials discovery

education.major: Integrated M.S. & Ph.D. Program in Chemical Engineering

experience.company: AI Convergence Data Analysis Professional Training Program

achievements: Department of Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering
Faculty sponsor: Professor Jeffery R. Long
Research findings presentation to experts in the field

projects.title: Integrated Solution for Design and Characterization of High-Performance Organic Cathode Materials
projects.description: Mid-career Research Program (National Research Foundation of Korea, NRF)
projects.role: Conducted computational design and performance analysis of eco-friendly organic cathode materials
outcomes: Established structure–property relationships through DFT-based analysis
First-author publications in ACS Applied Materials & Interfaces, etc.

projects.title: Predictive Computational and Thermodynamic Modeling for Screening SF6 Alternative Insulating Gas
projects.description: Korea Electric Power Research Institute, KEPRI
projects.role: Developed integrated framework combining DFT, thermodynamics, and machine learning
outcomes: Established predictive protocols for dielectric constant evaluation
First-author publication in J. Phys. Chem. A
